channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Spirit of 1776
item.description: We have work to do. Will you help us reach our goal?

item.title: A Call for a Declaration of Charity
item.description: Mark Independence Day by embodying true American values.

item.title: Is Scott Wiener Still Queer?
item.description: The gay Jewish California progressive discovers he must oppose Israel.

item.title: Chinese AI's Sputnik Moment
item.description: This time, Washington helped fuel China's leap forward.
